en: Now the tax collectors and sinners were all drawing near to hear him.
zh: 眾稅吏和罪人，都接近耶穌，要聽他講道。

en: And the Pharisees and the scribes grumbled, saying, "This man receives sinners and eats with them."
zh: 法利賽人和經學家，紛紛議論說：“這個人接待罪人，又和他們一起吃飯。”

en: So he told them this parable:
zh: 耶穌就對他們講了這個比喻，說：

en: "What man of you, having a hundred sheep, if he has lost one of them, does not leave the ninety-nine in the open country, and go after the one that is lost, until he finds it?
zh: “你們中間誰有一百隻羊，失去一隻，不把九十九隻留下在曠野，去尋找那失落的，直到找著呢？

en: And when he has found it, he lays it on his shoulders, rejoicing.
zh: 既找著了，就歡歡喜喜地放在肩上，

en: And when he comes home, he calls together his friends and his neighbors, saying to them, 'Rejoice with me, for I have found my sheep that was lost.'
zh: 回到家裡，請朋友鄰舍來，對他們說：‘請大家和我一同歡樂，因為我失去的羊已經找到了！’

en: Just so, I tell you, there will be more joy in heaven over one sinner who repents than over ninety-nine righteous persons who need no repentance.
zh: 我告訴你們，因為一個罪人悔改，天上也要這樣為他歡樂，比為九十九個不用悔改的義人歡樂更大。

en: "Or what woman, having ten silver coins, if she loses one coin, does not light a lamp and sweep the house and seek diligently until she finds it?
zh: “或是一個女人，有十個銀幣 ，失去一個，哪能不點上燈，打掃屋子，細細地找，直到找著呢？

en: And when she has found it, she calls together her friends and neighbors, saying, 'Rejoice with me, for I have found the coin that I had lost.'
zh: 既找著了，就請朋友鄰舍來，說：‘請大家和我一同歡樂，因為我失去的那個銀幣，已經找到了。’

en: Just so, I tell you, there is joy before the angels of God over one sinner who repents."
zh: 我告訴你們，因為一個罪人悔改， 神的使者也必這樣為他歡樂。”

en: And he said, "There was a man who had two sons.
zh: 耶穌又說：“某人有兩個兒子。

en: And the younger of them said to his father, 'Father, give me the share of property that is coming to me.' And he divided his property between them.
zh: 小兒子對父親說：‘爸爸，請把我應得的家業給我。’父親就把財產分給他們兩兄弟。

en: Not many days later, the younger son gathered all he had and took a journey into a far country, and there he squandered his property in reckless living.
zh: 過了不多幾天，小兒子收拾一切，到遠方去了，在那裡生活放蕩，浪費錢財。

en: And when he had spent everything, a severe famine arose in that country, and he began to be in need.
zh: 他花盡了一切所有的，那地方又遇上了嚴重的饑荒，就窮困起來；

en: So he went and hired himself out to one of the citizens of that country, who sent him into his fields to feed pigs.
zh: 於是他去投靠當地的一個居民。那人打發他到田裡去放豬，

en: And he was longing to be fed with the pods that the pigs ate, and no one gave him anything.
zh: 他恨不得吃豬所吃的豆莢，可是沒有人給他。

en: "But when he came to himself, he said, 'How many of my father's hired servants have more than enough bread, but I perish here with hunger!
zh: 他醒悟過來，說：‘我父親有那麼多雇工，又有豐富的食物，我卻要在這裡餓死嗎？

en: I will arise and go to my father, and I will say to him, "Father, I have sinned against heaven and before you.
zh: 我要起來，到我父親那裡去，對他說：爸爸，我得罪了天，也得罪了你，

en: I am no longer worthy to be called your son. Treat me as one of your hired servants."'
zh: 不配再稱為你的兒子，把我當作一個雇工吧！’

en: And he arose and came to his father. But while he was still a long way off, his father saw him and felt compassion, and ran and embraced him and kissed him.
zh: 於是他起來往父親那裡去。他還在遠處時，他父親看見了他，就動了慈心，跑過去抱著他，連連與他親吻。

en: And the son said to him, 'Father, I have sinned against heaven and before you. I am no longer worthy to be called your son.'
zh: 兒子說：‘爸爸，我得罪了天，也得罪了你，不配再稱為你的兒子。’

en: But the father said to his servants, 'Bring quickly the best robe, and put it on him, and put a ring on his hand, and shoes on his feet.
zh: 父親卻吩咐僕人說：‘快把那最好的袍子拿來給他穿，把戒指戴在他手上，把鞋穿在他腳上，

en: And bring the fattened calf and kill it, and let us eat and celebrate.
zh: 把肥牛犢牽來宰了，我們要吃喝快樂，

en: For this my son was dead, and is alive again; he was lost, and is found.' And they began to celebrate.
zh: 因為我這兒子是死而復活、失而又得的。’他們就歡樂起來。

en: "Now his older son was in the field, and as he came and drew near to the house, he heard music and dancing.
zh: “那時，大兒子正在田裡。他回來離家不遠的時候，聽見音樂跳舞的聲音，

en: And he called one of the servants and asked what these things meant.
zh: 就叫了一個僕人來，問他這是怎麼一回事。

en: And he said to him, 'Your brother has come, and your father has killed the fattened calf, because he has received him back safe and sound.'
zh: 僕人說：‘你弟弟回來了，你父親因為他平安無恙地回來，就宰了肥牛犢。’

en: But he was angry and refused to go in. His father came out and entreated him,
zh: 大兒子就生氣，不肯進去；父親出來勸他。

en: but he answered his father, 'Look, these many years I have served you, and I never disobeyed your command, yet you never gave me a young goat, that I might celebrate with my friends.
zh: 他對父親說：‘你看，我服事你這麼多年，從來沒有違背過你的命令，可是你沒有給我一隻山羊羔，叫我和朋友一同歡樂。

en: But when this son of yours came, who has devoured your property with prostitutes, you killed the fattened calf for him!'
zh: 但你這個兒子，常常跟娼妓在一起，花盡了你的財產，他一回來，你倒為他宰殺肥牛犢！’

en: And he said to him, 'Son, you are always with me, and all that is mine is yours.
zh: 父親對他說：‘孩子，你常跟我在一起，我的一切都是你的。

en: It was fitting to celebrate and be glad, for this your brother was dead, and is alive; he was lost, and is found.'"
zh: 只是因為你這個弟弟是死而復活、失而又得的，我們應該歡喜快樂。’”
